name: Clopidogrel Poor Metabolizers - Comprehensive Provider Query
description: Provider-level query for clopidogrel poor metabolizers per PheKB VESPA algorithm — patients on clopidogrel who experience adverse cardiovascular events (MI). The intersection (not just union) defines putative poor metabolizers.
prompt: Find clopidogrel-treated patients who experienced acute myocardial infarction — putative clopidogrel poor metabolizers per the VESPA algorithm.

prompts.broad: Find clopidogrel-treated patients with subsequent acute myocardial infarction — the case definition for clopidogrel poor metabolizers in the PheKB VESPA pharmacogenetic study.
prompts.expert: I need to identify putative clopidogrel poor metabolizers per the PheKB Vanderbilt VESPA algorithm — patients who were on clopidogrel and subsequently experienced an acute myocardial infarction, suggesting inadequate antiplatelet response. Run two queries: first, MedicationRequest resources for clopidogrel coded in RxNorm; second, Condition resources for AMI diagnoses across ICD-10-CM and SNOMED CT. Patients appearing in both queries — that is, clopidogrel-treated patients who also have an AMI diagnosis — represent the putative poor-metabolizer cases.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Multi-query for clopidogrel + AMI (PheKB VESPA poor metabolizer cases).
